---
title: "Hanna Kim"
image: Hanna Kim.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 13em
  image-alt: Hanna Kim's headshot taken in 2022
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hanna-kim-587616a4/
    - text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/mikannahh
    - text: Email
      href: mailto::hanna.kim@wisc.edu
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
